Package com.enovka.gemini4j.domain

Class SemanticRetrieverConfig

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.domain.SemanticRetrieverConfig
  • public class SemanticRetrieverConfig
extends Object
    Configuration for retrieving grounding content from a Corpus or Document created using the Semantic Retriever API.
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

    • Method Detail

      • builder

        public static SemanticRetrieverConfig.SemanticRetrieverConfigBuilder builder()

      • toBuilder

        public SemanticRetrieverConfig.SemanticRetrieverConfigBuilder toBuilder()

      • getSource

        public String getSource()
        Required. Name of the resource for retrieval, e.g. `corpora/123` or `corpora/123/documents/abc`.

      • getQuery

        public Content getQuery()
        Required. Query to use for similarity matching Chunks in the given resource.

      • getMetadataFilters

        public List<MetadataFilter> getMetadataFilters()
        Optional. Filters for selecting Documents and/or Chunks from the resource.

      • getMaxChunksCount

        public Integer getMaxChunksCount()
        Optional. Maximum number of relevant Chunks to retrieve.

      • getMinimumRelevanceScore

        public Double getMinimumRelevanceScore()
        Optional. Minimum relevance score for retrieved relevant Chunks.

      • setSource

        public SemanticRetrieverConfig setSource​(String source)
        Required. Name of the resource for retrieval, e.g. `corpora/123` or `corpora/123/documents/abc`.
        Returns:
        this.
